{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55427", "cvss": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-74", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component ('Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary

`coder config-ssh` wrote server-supplied SSH settings (`HostnameSuffix`, `SSHConfigOptions`) into the user's `~/.ssh/config` without sanitizing embedded newlines or restricting directives so a malicious or compromised Coder server could inject arbitrary SSH configuration.

> **Note:** Practical exploitation requires control of the server-supplied values through a malicious or compromised deployment, a man-in-the-middle position or admin access to the `HostnameSuffix` and `SSHConfigOptions` settings.

### Impact

A server administrator or an attacker who controlled the server, could inject a directive such as `ProxyCommand` and achieve arbitrary code execution on any developer workstation that ran `coder config-ssh`. Injected commands ran with the local user's privileges and applied to all SSH connections, not just Coder workspaces.

### Patches

The fix validates `HostnameSuffix` and `SSHConfigOptions` against a strict character set that rejects newlines and other control characters.

The fix was backported to all supported release lines:

| Release line | Patched version |
|---|---|
| 2.34 | [v2.34.2](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.34.2) |
| 2.33 | [v2.33.8](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.33.8) |
| 2.32 | [v2.32.7](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.32.7) |
| 2.29 (ESR) | [v2.29.17](https://github.com/coder/coder/releases/tag/v2.29.17) |

### Workarounds

Inspect `coder config-ssh --dry-run` output before applying changes.

### Resources

- Fix: #26154

### Credits

Coder would like to thank Anthropic's Security Team (ANT-2026-22437) for independently disclosing this issue!", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00466, "percentile": 0.372}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mcqq-fqgf-rxwm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-06T20:53:54Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mcqq-fqgf-rxwm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mcqq-fqgf-rxwm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55427"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-06T20:53:54Z", "references": ["https://github.com/coder/coder/security/advisories/GHSA-mcqq-fqgf-rxwm", "https://github.com/coder/coder/pull/26154", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mcqq-fqgf-rxwm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/coder/coder/security-advisories/GHSA-mcqq-fqgf-rxwm", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/coder/coder", "summary": "Coder vulnerable to SSH config injection via unsanitized server-supplied values in `coder config-ssh`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T20:53:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mcqq-fqgf-rxwm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.34.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.34.0, < 2.34.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.33.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.33.0, < 2.33.8"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.32.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.30.0, < 2.32.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.29.17", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/coder/coder/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.29.17"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Coder vulnerable to SSH config injection via unsanitized server-supplied values in `coder config-ssh`
